---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the current problem or limitation.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in clear terms.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Scope and Impact

- Affected areas:
- Expected benefits:
- Possible risks:

## Acceptance Criteria

Define clear criteria for done:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

Add any references, links, mockups, or examples.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and did not find a duplicate.
- [ ] This request is focused on one coherent improvement.
- [ ] I removed sensitive information (keys/tokens/private data).
